review_criteria: Verify that git show strictly matches the execution result artifact.
Verify implementation changes are STRICTLY limited to 'install.sh', 'setup.sh', 'bin/agent-protocol-init', and 'adapters/*.tpl'.
Verify NO modifications were made to the MCP Server logic (src/mcp-server/src/index.ts).
Verify NO removal of legacy Python scripts or unauthorized refactoring of Markdown content occurred.
Verify that the generated scripts do NOT statically write workflow state into this repository's tracking index.
Verify artifact changes are strictly limited to allowed_artifacts.
